creator: commit-hook@FreeBSD.org
text:
A commit references this bug:

Author: allanjude
Date: Fri Jun  6 01:40:01 UTC 2014
New revision: 45017
URL: http://svnweb.freebsd.org/changeset/doc/45017

Log:
  Wrong date listed for errata notice EN-14:06.exec on the website.
  The date on the actual notice is correct (2014-06-03) but the date in
  doc/head/share/xml/notices.xml wass incorrectly entered as 2014-05-03 in
  rD45000

  PR:		190628
  Approved by:	wblock (mentor)

Changes:
  head/share/xml/notices.xml
